summary: Added Train-owned active Today and History projections so completed, modified, or skipped sessions move out of the Train Today section and into History immediately while preserving all today sessions for Today-domain summaries.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for train-completed-sessions-history
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: The behavior is domain-tested but not covered by screenshot/UI regression proof.
Today-domain summaries still intentionally use todaySessions, so completed training sessions can remain counted in Today while moving to History in Train.
